examples: But he could not stop, for the mother ptarmigan was running on.
A black fox came toward him, carrying a ptarmigan in his mouth.
It was a fearful cry, but the fox, leaping away in fright, did not drop the ptarmigan.
Higher up on the plateau, Arctic buntings, ptarmigan and golden eagles can be glimpsed, while the mountain scrub is adorned with rare plants such as globeflower and roseroot.
